name: Barbecued Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt over the roast and place it in a crock pot.
2. Spread tomato paste evenly over the meat.
3. Embed peppercorns into the tomato paste.
4. Top with chopped onions and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 8-10 hours.
6. Serve the meat with the accumulated gravy.
